testcase.name: test_excessive_steps_detection

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 30 < 30 + where 30 = EfficiencyVerdict(score=0.95, grade=<EfficiencyGrade.PERFECT: 'perfect'>, reason='Agent took 30 steps (optimal: ~30). Issues: Simple task required 30 execution steps. This suggests speculative or exploratory execution.. Efficiency score: 95%', redundancies=[RedundancyFinding(redundancy_type=<RedundancyType.SPECULATIVE: 'speculative'>, description='Simple task required 30 execution steps. This suggests speculative or exploratory execution.', span_ids=[], severity=0.5, wasted_ms=0.0, wasted_tokens=0)], total_steps=30, estimated_optimal_steps=30, redundant_steps=0, total_duration_ms=0.0, wasted_duration_ms=0.0, total_tokens=0, wasted_tokens=0, optimization_suggestions=['Reduce speculative execution. Plan before acting to minimize the number of steps.']).estimated_optimal_steps

testcase.failure: tests\test_aither_eval.py:271: in test_excessive_steps_detection assert verdict.estimated_optimal_steps < 30 E AssertionError: assert 30 < 30 E + where 30 = EfficiencyVerdict(score=0.95, grade=<EfficiencyGrade.PERFECT: 'perfect'>, reason='Agent took 30 steps (optimal: ~30). Issues: Simple task required 30 execution steps. This suggests speculative or exploratory execution.. Efficiency score: 95%', redundancies=[RedundancyFinding(redundancy_type=<RedundancyType.SPECULATIVE: 'speculative'>, description='Simple task required 30 execution steps. This suggests speculative or exploratory execution.', span_ids=[], severity=0.5, wasted_ms=0.0, wasted_tokens=0)], total_steps=30, estimated_optimal_steps=30, redundant_steps=0, total_duration_ms=0.0, wasted_duration_ms=0.0, total_tokens=0, wasted_tokens=0, optimization_suggestions=['Reduce speculative execution. Plan before acting to minimize the number of steps.']).estimated_optimal_steps
